result.stdout:
Description:
  MCP server for debugging .NET applications

Usage:
  DebugMcp [options]

Options:
  -s, --stderr-logging                 Also write logs to stderr alongside MCP notifications
  -r, --no-roslyn                      Disable Roslyn code analysis tools (use when JetBrains MCP provides equivalent functionality)
  --no-symbols                         Disable automatic PDB symbol downloads from symbol servers
  --symbol-servers <symbol-servers>    Semicolon-separated list of SSQP symbol server URLs (default: Microsoft + NuGet)
  --symbol-cache <symbol-cache>        Directory path for persistent PDB symbol cache (default: ~/.debug-mcp/symbols)
  --symbol-timeout <symbol-timeout>    Per-file download timeout in seconds (default: 30)
  --symbol-max-size <symbol-max-size>  Maximum PDB file size to download in MB (default: 100)
  -?, -h, --help                       Show help and usage information
  --version                            Show version information

  --symbol-cache <symbol-cache>        Directory path for persistent PDB symbol cache (default: ~/.debug-mcp/symbols)
  --symbol-timeout <symbol-timeout>    Per-file download timeout in seconds (default: 30)
  --symbol-max-size <symbol-max-size>  Maximum PDB file size to download in MB (default: 100)
  -?, -h, --help                       Show help and usage information
